itemName.zh: 奈特军械公司 (KAC) SR-25 7.62x51 精确射手步枪 ★
itemName.en: Knight's Armament Company SR-25 7.62x51 marksman rifle

itemName.zh: 雷明顿 R11 RSASS 7.62x51 精确射手步枪 ☆

description.zh:
士兵，注意听！我需要看看你的技能。

有把狙击步枪带入城市环境过吗？现在是时候了，向我证明你的本领。任何精确射手步枪或狙击步枪都可以，带它去城市，并学会如何正确使用你的步枪！前往时要小心，那里有一些帮派让区域变得不安全。祝你好运，士兵。
description.en:
Warrior, listen up! I need to see how skilled you are.

Ever brought a sniper rifle into a urban environment? Well you are about too now, prove to me how good you are. Any marksman rifle or sniper rifle will be fine, take it to the city, and learn how to handle your rifle properly! And be careful when going there, a few gangs are making the area unsafe. Good luck warrior.
